title: Coral's Lost Buildings
description: The Mod Adds Some New Buildings And Items For You To Find
body:
This Mod Adds New Buildings And Items That use Can Use Or Loot For Gear, Or You Can Use The Structures As A Starter Base If You Wanted As They Have Everything You Would Need. For More Info On Structures Or Items Please Visit The [Wiki](https://github.com/0Coral0/Coral-s-Lost-Buildings)

## Buildings
**Forgotten House**

## Items
**Ancient Relic**
